## ListViewParams interface

The parameters for configuring the listview.

**Signature:**

```typescript
interface ListViewParams extends ElementParams 
```
**Extends:** [ElementParams](./openrct2-flexui.elementparams.md)

</td><td>

[Bindable](./openrct2-flexui.bindable.md)<!-- -->&lt;ListViewItem\[\] \| string\[\]&gt;


</td><td>

Specifies the items within the listview, either as a single dimension array for a single row or a multi-dimensional array for multiple columns per row. Can also include seperator objects to divide the list into multiple sections.


</td></tr>
